name: Feature Implementation
description: Generates production-ready feature code aligned to existing codebase patterns. Produces DB migration, TypeORM entity changes, service layer, controller, DTOs with validation, and unit test scaffolding — all following naming conventions discovered by the context scanner.

checks.prompt: Generate the full feature implementation following existing codebase patterns from the context contract. Include: (1) SQL migration with up/down scripts, (2) TypeORM entity updates, (3) Service class with business logic and error handling, (4) NestJS controller with route handlers and Swagger decorators, (5) DTOs using class-validator with full validation messages, (6) Unit test scaffolding with describe/it blocks for every public method. Match naming conventions, file naming, and architectural patterns exactly.
checks.pass: feature implementation generated following codebase patterns
